podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementday2kar:
My dear followers, it might come as surprise to you, but you aren’t the only ones who are listening to me. You are not the only ones watching me. The government has been after me for a long time, snooping and prying into my personal life in a feeble attempt to discredit me. That much I was aware of – and I treaded carefully day and night. But even I could not have anticipated the methods they would resolve to.
 
Instead of attacking me, their declared enemy, they went for my poor wife. Karen, who has always stood both loyally and supportive by my side, has been arrested on FALSE ALLEGATIONS of misallocating funds from her employer! WHAT A PREPOSTEROUS LIE! She is being held HOSTAGE in a conflict that isn’t hers!
 
But I will not shut The People’s Voice down. Neither now, nor ever. I owe it to you, my supporters, to speak out loud what needs to be said. I WON’T ALLOW ANYONE TO INTIMIDATE ME! No, I will not stop! I will fight back, and more furiously than ever before! I will go after THEM, just as they went after my wife. I will pick their precious lies apart, one by one, and expose their misdeeds so they are plain to see for everyone. All of you shall be witnesses for the TRUTH.
\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u00:

podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementday3ily:
My dear followers, those of you who still remain. 
The story that has finally been spread by the despicable government mouthpiece… it is-
 
Ilya? What are you doing here? I’m in the middle of-
 
I DON’T CARE WHAT YOU ARE IN THE MIDDLE OF, YOU SELF-SERVICING ASSHOLE! JUST STOP! STOP SPREADING THIS FABRICATED BULLSHIT ABOUT ME! Your followers, they are harassing me already, threatening me!
 
THINK FOR A SECOND, BROTHER! Those are all lies! Why would I treat my own brother like that?
 “Treat your brother like that”, those words from your mouth… Do you wanna know WHY I invented that story of you saving those kids at Prava Secondary? To give you hope again. To make you revered once again, admired like you were by the children you taught and who looked up to you! I created that story to make you feel great again. Or so I thought. Instead… I created a monster.
 
A MONSTER?!
 
But I can undo this mistake.
 
Put my revolver back down! At once!
 
I’ve had it with you, brother. You will neither bully me nor anyone any longer.
 
Hah! You’re not going to shoot me, you worthless piece of shit. You’ve always been living in your dream world, disconnected from reality. All you do is imagining things, but you never ACT. Neither now, nor--

podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementarreste:
My dear followers. Yes. This is exactly what you think it is. I found Oleg Bakay.
 
What you see before you is an image obtained from a surveillance camera feed from the ruins of my old school, showing him among soldiers of THE NATION. These highly trained professionals ARRESTED him, a soldier in service of the Pargesian army, while he was HIDING AWAY FROM THEM.
 
The true nature of the National government is laid bare before you. Through their propaganda machine called The National Beholder they dared to make their false allegations against me and The People’s Voice as a whole, they claimed I’d be responsible for Bakay’s disappearance – when it was THEM all along!
 
But, when President Kassart and Prime Minister Blaine are such close friends, why would they arrest a fellow soldier, you might ask. Oleg Bakay was the person responsible for the attack on Prava Secondary, the school I have been principal of a long time ago – and they knew it. They knew the moment he’d disappear the blame was on me. To shut me up once and for all.
 
BUT THE PEOPLE’S VOICE CANNOT BE SILENCED!
 
So, what is there to do for you, my dear followers, against the OPPRESSIVE FORCE of the National government and the Kassart regime? Do not listen to their corrupt and manipulative media outlets! Do not fail to remind Kassart what has transpired here today! Do not let them sweep this under the carpet, to pass the buck, to influence you with such outrageously false information, to make people vanish to manipulate your thoughts! Or you may be next! STAND UP FOR YOUR RIGHTS AND RESIST KASSART! RESIST BLAINE! LET’S RETAKE OUR COUNTRY FROM PRESIDENT PUPPET!
podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementkilled:
My dear followers. Yes. This is exactly what you think it is. I found Oleg Bakay.
 
What you see before you is an image obtained from a surveillance camera feed from the ruins of my old school, showing him among soldiers of THE NATION. These highly trained professionals COWARDLY SHOT him, a soldier in service of the Pargesian army, while he was HIDING AWAY FROM THEM.
 
Now, as shocking as that image may be to you, the HEINOUS nature of the National government is laid bare before you. Through their propaganda machine called The National Beholder they dared to make their false allegations against me and The People’s Voice as a whole, they claimed I’d be responsible for Bakay’s disappearance – when it was THEM all along!
 
But, why would they murder a fellow soldier when President Kassart and Prime Minister Blaine are such close friends, you might ask. Oleg Bakay was the person responsible for the attack on Prava Secondary, the school I have been principal of a long time ago – and they knew it. They knew the moment he’d turn up dead, everyone would blame me. They took a life, only to shut me up once and for all.
 
BUT THE PEOPLE’S VOICE CANNOT BE SILENCED!
 
So, what is there to do for you, my dear followers, against the OPPRESSIVE FORCE of the National government and the Kassart regime? Do not listen to their corrupt and manipulative media outlets! Do not fail to remind Kassart what has transpired here today! Do not let them sweep this under the carpet, to pass the buck, to influence you with such outrageously false information, to take a life to manipulate your thoughts! Or you may be next! STAND UP FOR YOUR RIGHTS AND RESIST KASSART! RESIST BLAINE! LET’S RETAKE OUR COUNTRY FROM PRESIDENT PUPPET!

podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementday2aff:
My dear followers, it might come as surprise to you, but you aren’t the only ones who are listening to me. You are not the only ones watching me. The government has been after me for a long time, snooping and prying into my personal life in a feeble attempt to discredit me. That much I was aware of – and I treaded carefully day and night. But even I could not have anticipated the methods they would resolve to.
 
You have probably seen the dirty pictures by now they spread around the internet like a plague, showing my wife and… my brother… nothing… NOTHING ABOUT THAT IS TRUE! THESE ARE MERE MONTAGES! It is a pitiful... It is a pitiful, meritless effort to antagonize me against my family, to ridicule me!
 
But I will not shut The People’s Voice down. Neither now, nor ever. I owe it to you, my supporters, to speak out loud what needs to be said. I WON’T ALLOW ANYONE TO INTIMIDATE ME! No, I will not stop! I will fight back, and more furiously than ever before! I will go after THEM. I will pick their precious lies apart, one by one, and expose their misdeeds so they are plain to see for everyone. All of you shall be witnesses for the TRUTH.
podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementday3rab:
My dear followers, those of you who still remain. 
The story that has finally been spread by the despicable government mouthpiece… it is true. All of it. I never saved those children. Because I was too afraid. Because I ran for my life, eager of saving it before theirs. Here I now am. Alive. And they aren't.
 
I had so long forgotten about it, and now… It’s shaking me to my core. I believed that if I only tried hard enough, I could change things, that I could make things better for my people at home in Parges. I believed I could fight against the corrupt, evil, rotten politicians longing for power at the people’s expense. I believed I could free my home country from these parasites and go back home. If only I twisted words long enough.
 
We all need a reliable base on which our world is based – our truth. This was mine. But now I realize that I have been living a lie. Not only a lie that made you believe in me, but a lie that allowed me to forget who I actually was. A far too comfortable lie.
 
Only one thing is worse: Knowing that even as I speak you all continue, carry on, fight on with all your fury, perpetuating that very lie endlessly, creating new truths based on fake claims put out there ages ago. What will become of this world when everybody has their own truth? What will be real? Dependable? Everything… will be nothing.
 
Truth is dead – and I killed it that very day I was too afraid to speak up and correct a mistake. But no longer. This story has to end. On my terms.
 
There’s hardly anything more concrete than a bullet. It creates a tangible, uncomfortable fact. The very thing needed for a resurrection of truth.
podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementday2ily:

podcast_peoplesvoice_announcementday3peo:
My dear followers, this is going to be my final announcement. Why? Because the truth now lies in your hands.
 
Take a good look at what has just been revealed on Percoleaks. It has been exposed, and proven nonetheless, that the governments of both The Nation and Parges are corrupt frauds, responsible blatantly for misleading and killing their own people. It’s now public knowledge that these governments are conspiring in order to keep the conflict alive, a long, devastating war that has already cost so many lives. This bloodshed is unnecessary, and it’s all for NOTHING! Nothing but the political power of a few rich, evil, and corrupt MEN IN SUITS.
 
There is only one logical course of action: I call on you. I CHALLENGE YOU to finally stop believing the lies coming from these corrupt leaders. Power is nothing but a common belief – and it is waning by the minute! Shake off the invisible hand on your shoulder! What becomes of the future is up to you alone. YOU, THE PEOPLE, NEED TO SHAPE YOUR OWN TRUTH!
 
And to those of you who listen to me because those men pay you for it: Know that your time is finally over.
 
Because the PEOPLE WILL RISE.
